arts.ttl: Danilo Set to Leave Juventus for Brazil, Napoli Move Falls Through
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, Juventus defender Danilo is preparing to bid farewell to Juventus and Italy. The 33-year-old former Porto and Manchester City player has decided to return to his homeland, where Flamengo and Santos are vying for his signature. arts.ttl: CM: Juventus Consider Tonali Swap Deal as Douglas Luiz Attracts Newcastle Interest
arts.sum: Juventus are reportedly exploring an intriguing transfer possibility involving Douglas Luiz and Sandro Tonali. The Italian giants are considering a potential swap deal with Newcastle United, which could see Luiz move to the Premier League club while bringing Tonali back to Serie A. arts.ttl: Danilo Set to Join Napoli After Weekend Clash with Juventus
arts.sum: Napoli are on the verge of securing the signature of Brazilian defender Danilo, with the deal expected to be finalized after the upcoming weekend. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that the transfer will take place following the highly anticipated match between Napoli and Juventus, adding an intriguing subplot to an already crucial fixture.
